news.title: Forget ‘TechnoKing’: Elon Musk will really be king at SpaceX
news.summary: Musk, who will have more than 50% of the voting power, will have a monarchical grip over the publicly-traded version of SpaceX — control that goes far beyond what other tech founders enjoy.

news.title: Law enforcement shuts down VPN service used by two dozen ransomware gangs
news.summary: First VPN promised hackers complete anonymity for their cyberattacks. But Europol said it was able to notify the service’s users that they have now been identified.

news.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
news.summary: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

news.title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
news.summary: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

news.title: Trump delays AI security executive order: ‘I don’t want to get in the way of that leading’
news.summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

news.title: Philips’ new display has a screen on both sides
news.summary: Its name might be dull and uninspired, but the Philips 24B2D5300 Business Monitor brings a novel feature I've never seen on a display before: screens on either side. news.title: One of Meta’s big legal reckonings just ended in a settlement
news.summary: After back-to-back losses in trials grappling with its impact on teens' mental health, Meta just settled what was supposed to be its next legal battle with Kentucky's Breathitt County School District. news.title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
news.summary: Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2. The studio announced Thursday that it's releasing the last major update for the game on June 9th as its focus "turns towards a new beginning for Bungie." news.title: Sonos’s pint-sized Roam 2 speaker is 25 percent off for Memorial Day
news.summary: If your summer plans involve spending any time outdoors, whether on the trail or at a pool party, a good portable Bluetooth speaker can go a long way. news.title: Palantir Held a Hack Week to Add New Controls to Software Used by ICE
news.summary: The hackathon, held to build user-auditing tools for Palantir customers, comes as the company struggles to address employee concerns over its relationship with ICE.

news.title: Why the 2026 Hurricane Season Might Not Be That Bad
news.summary: The impending arrival of El Niño will help keep the number of storms low. But it only takes one landfall to create a catastrophe.

news.title: I Cloned Myself With Gemini’s AI Avatar Tool. The Result Was Unnervingly Me
news.summary: I used the Gemini app to generate lifelike videos featuring a digital clone of myself. Google sees this as the future of creation. I’m still creeped out.

news.title: NYC and LA Are Teaming Up to Fight for EVs
news.summary: After the Trump administration turned away from electrification, two of the nation’s biggest governments will advocate for more electric vans, police cars, and eventually, snowplows.
